snippet.title: Doob Gaye (Official Video) Guru Randhawa | Urvashi Rautela | Jaani, B Praak | Remo D | Bhushan K
snippet.description:

snippet.title: I got admitted to the hospital - Part 1
snippet.description:
Makkale.. I was not feeling well and got admitted to the hospital. The whole hospital scene was really depressing. Vlogging from the hospital bed and staying positive helped me recover faster 😛 A positive attitude can recreate your reality. 

The times are tough, everyone is in some version of covid crises directly or indirectly. Just stick around and stay positive. #ThisTooShallPass #StayStrong #StaySafe

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/priyankapdeshpande/?hl=en

snippet.title: विश्वकल्याणासाठी १ तास आई भगवतीची अतिउच्च कोटीची सेवा श्री दुर्गासप्तशती पाठ
snippet.description:
📝सेवेची नोंद करण्यासाठी Google form लिंक 
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScDIqXSCcNmTxu33kL8WRoisgnQApxYDdpi0XN85HYIDDAKyQ/viewform?usp=sf_link

कोरोना महामारीतुन जगाची सुटका होण्यासाठी आजच्या ह्या सेवेचे आयोजन करण्यात आले आहे. 
जगभरातील भाविक व सेवेकरी तसेच सर्व शक्तीपीठ देवस्थान व भक्तगण यांना या सेवेत सहभागी होण्याचे आव्हान करण्यात आले आहे. 


एकच ध्यास विश्वकल्याणासाठी एक तास 

श्री स्वामी समर्थ सेवा मार्ग मार्फत २१ वा शतकात शांतता आरोग्य अबाधित राहावे यासाठी यापूर्वी 2007 मध्ये श्री दुर्गासप्तशती ग्रंथाचे एक कोटी पाठ पूर्ण  झाले सप्तशृंगी  गडाच्या पायथ्याशी कोटी चंडी सेवा भारत मातेच्या चरणी राष्ट्रासाठी अर्पण करण्यात आली एक अब्ज श्री दुर्गा सप्तशती पाठ पठण सेवा २००७ पासून सुरू असून ८० कोटी पाठ पूर्ण  झाले आहे.शासन प्रशासक व नागरिकांचे प्रयत्नात अध्यात्मिक कृतीतून राष्ट्र समृद्धीसाठी श्री भगवतीचा आशीर्वाद मिळावा व कोरोना महामारी चे संकट लवकर दूर व्हावे म्हणून परमपूज्य गुरुमाऊली यांच्या संकल्पनेनुसार विश्वातील तमाम सेवेकरी, भाविक व  नागरिकांच्या वतीने १ मे २०२१  शनिवारी सायंकाळी ७ वा Dindori Pranit Seva Marg युट्युब  चॅनलच्या  माध्यमातून ऑनलाइन श्रीदुर्गासप्तशती पाठाचे नियोजन केले आहे तरी जास्तीत जास्त सहभाग घ्यावा.
 
गुरुमाऊली परमपूज्य आण्णासाहेब मोरे 
प्रमुख – श्री स्वामी समर्थ सेवा व आध्यात्मिक विकास मार्ग (दिंडोरी प्रणीत)
प्रमुख – अखिल भारतीय श्री स्वामी समर्थ गुरुपीठ, त्र्यंबकेश्वर.
अध्यक्ष – श्री स्वामी समर्थ कृषी विकास व संशोधन चॅरीटेबल ट्रस्ट.

अधिक माहितीसाठी संपर्क:
श्री स्वामी समर्थ प्रधान केंद्र, दिंडोरी : ०२५५७-२२१७१०
श्री गुरुपीठ मध्यवर्ती कार्यालय :  ०२५९४- २३४२५३/५४ 
All India Shri Swami Samarth Gurupith, Trimbakeshwar, Nasik
Pradhan kendra Dindori, Nasik

१) YouTube channel Link: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC5mIaJno_3MmoNbn0NWwwJg?view_as=subscriber

२) Instagram Link https://www.instagram.com/dindoripranitsevamarg/

३) Twitter Link
https://twitter.com/dindoripranit

४) Facebook account Link
https://www.facebook.com/pradhankendra

५) Facebook Page Link:
https://www.facebook.com/dindoripranit/

६) Website Link:
https//:www.dindoripranit.org
७)ONLINE श्री जनकल्याण योजनेत सहभाग घेण्याकरिता https://www.dindoripranit.org/jankalyan-yojna  या लिंकवर जाऊन आपला फॉर्म भरावा  

🙏 सर्वांना विनंती आहे कि, वरील सर्व अधिकृत सोशिअल मिडियाला आपण स्वत: ✅ Follow, 👍 like, 📝 join, subscribe करून ज्ञानदानाच्या सेवेमध्ये सहभागी व्हावे.



Subscribe official YouTube channel Dindori pranit seva marg and Shree Gurupeeth

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 4 | Plan B Kya Hai?
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

UPSC is one of the toughest exams in the world with a success rate of less than 1%. As an Aspirant, you can’t ignore the fact that you might not crack it. Abhilash realizes this after talking to SK and Guri, they tell him everyone needs a Plan B. On the other hand, he is also being pressured by his company to end his sabbatical and join again. What will Abhilash do now? What will be his Plan B?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC: Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Music: Rohit Sharma 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 
Special Mention: Nilotpal Bora for Dhaaga

Music at the Bar: Love U More By Riley & TOMOS
Publishers: Soundcast Music

UPSC fact #91: Satyendra worked as a clerk in the excise department, his marriage was arranged with Aarti. But Aarti ran away a night before their wedding because she found out that she had cleared the PCS exam. Satyendra who was initially heartbroken worked really hard and became an IAS officer. Eventually, Aarti came back into his life and they got married.
PS: It’s a True Story.
-Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

snippet.title: Healing Through Breath | Day 1 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev
snippet.description:
Healing Through Breath | Day 1 of 10 Days Breath And Meditation Journey With Gurudev

Join our free 3-Day personalised Covid care program with our teachers to support - prevention, isolation care and recovery from Covid through Meditation, Breath and Yoga - http://aoliv.in/fightcorona

It took a global pandemic to make the world realize that our breath is the most important aspect of our being. With the second wave of COVID-19 ravaging the lives of thousands of people and the country's health infrastructure, it is time we take the responsibility of our lungs into our own hands.

The 10-Day breathing and meditation challenge brings you powerful breathing exercises that optimize your body's oxygen capacity and invigorating meditations that will completely relax your mind. Today, we will learn the Art of Breathing Right. We have been on this planet for decades but still, we don't know how to breathe in the right manner. Let's learn this basic thing today and follow it up with energizing exercises and meditation.

Join the 10 Day Breath and Meditation Journey on http://aoliv.in/10days

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra’s Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end. 

#VYRLOriginals #TuBhiSatayaJayega #AlyJasmin

snippet.description:

(https://www.sociopoolindia.com/)

When it's time for the board exams you know how exhausting one could get having to deal with all those extra specials classes and kinds of stuff. 
After facing all these at school and when you finally get back home, that's when the real screwing starts. 

Let's watch how torturous it could get when the parents take charge in preparing their kids, like a kick start at the back early in the morning, late-night studies, no playtime outside, TVs plugged out, etc...

snippet.title: എളുപ്പത്തിൽ ചൂട് ചൂട് സമോസ ഉണ്ടാക്കാം || Easy Chicken Samosa || Lekshmi Nair
snippet.description:
Hello dear friends, this is my 475th Vlog. In this video demonstrate how to make easy easy Chicken Samosa.

How to make Easy Chicken Samosa

Chicken -  250 gms
Kashmiri chilli powder - 1/2 tsp +  1/2 tsp
Pepper powder - 1/2 tsp +   1/2 tsp
Salt( according to taste )
Turmeric powder - 1/4 tsp +   1/4 tsp
Big onion - 3 nos (Finely chopped)
green chillies - 2 - 5 nos (Finely chopped)
Refined oil
Garam Masala powder - 1/2 tsp
Coriander leaves
Maida ( All Purpose Flour ) - 11/2  Cup
Dalda - 11/2  -  2 tbs
Rice flour 

Please share your valuable feedback's through the comment box.
Don't forget to Like, Share and Subscribe. Love you all :)

snippet.title: Ramyug | Official Trailer | Kunal Kohli | MX Original Series | MX Player
snippet.description:
Ek andekhe roop mein धर्म aur अधर्म ka paath padhaane aa raha hai रामयुग!

All episodes of #Ramyug out on 6th May.

Directed by Kunal Kohli

Key Cast: Diganth Manchale, Akkshay Dogra, Aishwarya Ojha, Kabir Duhan Singh, Vivan Bhatena, Navdeep Pallapolu, Anish John Kokken, Shishir Mohan Sharma, Jatin Sial, Shweta Gulati, Suparna Marwah, Mamta Verma, Tisca Chopra, Dalip Tahil, Anup Soni, Vikram Singh Chauhan, Hemant Kumar Pandey, Arun Singh, Ravi Jhankal, Shaan Grover, Amit Madan Gaur, Teena Singh and Danish Akhtar

About Ramyug: 
Rama, prince of Ayodhya, won the hand of the beautiful princess Sita, but was exiled with her and his brother Laksmana for 14 years through the plotting of his stepmother. In the forest, Sita was abducted by Ravana, and Rama with the help of Son of Vayu, Hanuman, gathered an army of monkeys and bears to search for her. The allies attacked Lanka, killed Ravana, and rescued Sita. After the couple's triumphant return to Ayodhya, Rama's righteous rule (Ram-raj) inaugurated a golden age for all mankind. 

The epic's poetic stature and marvelous story means that the story of Rama has been constantly retold by some of India's greatest writers both in Sanskrit and regional languages. It is one of the staples of various dramatic traditions, in court drama, dance-dramas, and in shadow-puppet theatres. In northern India, the annual Ram-lila or 'Rama-play' is performed at the autumn festival of Dassehra to celebrate with Rama and Sita the eventual triumph of light over darkness.

Ramyug the latest visual interpretation of this ancient text, seeks to bring modern technology in a never before used manner to narrate the epic.

snippet.title: Excuses Girls give to leave a Date ft. Parul Gulati, Tithi Raaj and Khushbu Baid
snippet.description:
We’ve all been on bad dates and have had to sit through them with a polite smile on our face. But when a date is so bad that you can’t seem to stay there a second longer, you may have to get creative with your escape. Here are just some of the wacky, extreme and weird ways that Girls leave a Date.

snippet.description:
After losing his eyesight, Omkar attempts suicide but Mayura steps in and tries to convince him to not give up his life because of this disability. Catch the sneak peek.

#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: वैशाख मास की चौथ की कहानी | Vaishakh maas ki chauth ki kahani | बड़ी चौथ की कथा | संकट चौथ की कथा
snippet.description:
वैशाख मास की चौथ की कहानी | Vaishakh maas ki chauth ki kahani | बड़ी चौथ की कथा | संकट चौथ की कथा
आज 30 अप्रैल 2021 को वैशाख मास की कृष्ण पक्ष की चतुर्थी के दिन मैं आप सभी के समक्ष वैशाख चौथ की कथा प्रस्तुत कर रही हूं। वैशाख चौथ को वैशाख संकष्टी चतुर्थी, बड़ी चौथ,  संकट चौथ, संकटा चौथ,  सकट चौथ आदि नामों से जाना जाता है। साल भर में 12 संकष्टी चतुर्थी आती है। सभी चतुर्थी तिथियों में वैशाख , भादों , कार्तिक , माघ की चतुर्थी की बड़ी चतुर्थी कहा जाता है | जो लोग पुरे 12 महीने  के चौथ  माता के व्रत का संकल्प करते हैं उन्हें वैशाख की बड़ी चौथ से व्रत का प्रारंभ करना चाहिए | 
 वैशाख की बड़ी चौथ का व्रत स्त्रियां अपने सुहाग की रक्षा, तथा संतान की मंगल कामना के लिए रखती हैं।

 वैशाख मास की चौथ के दिन चौथ माता तथा गणेश भगवान की पूजा की जाती है। वैशाख चौथ के दिन चंद्रमा को    दिए बिना व्रत पूरा नहीं  माना जाता।  वैशाख कृष्ण पक्ष की चतुर्थी के दिन सुबह सवेरे  नहा धोकर बड़ी चौथ के व्रत का संकल्प लिया जाता है। पूरा दिन मन ही मन गणेश भगवान तथा चौथ माता को याद किया जाता है। शाम को  फिर से स्नान करके स्वच्छ वस्त्र धारण करें।  श्री गणेश भगवान और चौथ माता को  गुड और देसी घी के चूरमे का प्रसाद चढ़ाएं। उसके बाद वैशाख बड़ी चौथ की कथा सुने। फिर चंद्रमा उदय होने के पश्चात चंद्रमा को अर्घ्य दें।  अर्घ्य देने के बाद भोजन करें ।
 आइए शुरू करते हैं वैशाख मास की बड़ी चौथ की कथा
Today, on 30 April 2021, on the fourth day of the Krishna Paksha of Vaishakh month, I am presenting the story of Vaishakh Chauth to all of you. Vaishakh Chauth is known by the names of Vaishakh Sankashti Chaturthi, Badi Chauth, Sankat Chauth, Sankata Chauth, Sakat Chauth etc. 12 Sankashti Chaturthi falls throughout the year. All Chaturthi dates are called Vaishakha, Bhado, Karthik, Badi Chaturthi of Magh Chaturthi. Those who pledge for the entire 12-month Chautha Mata fast should start the fast with a big Chauth of Vaishakh.
 The women keep the fast of Vaishakh Badi Chauth for the protection of their sweetheart, and to wish the child well.
 Chauth Mata and Lord Ganesha are worshiped on the fourth day of Vaishakh month. The fast is not considered complete without the moon being given on the day of Vaishakh Chauth. On the morning of Vaishakha Krishna Paksha Chaturthi, in the morning, taking a bath and taking a bath, a vow of Badi Chauth is resolved. Lord Ganesha and Chauth Mata are remembered throughout the day. In the evening, bathe again and wear clean clothes. Offer pudding of good and desi ghee to Shri Ganesh Bhagwan and Chauth Mata. After that, listen to the story of Vaisakh Badi Chauth. Then after the moon rises, offer the moon to the arghya. Take food after offering arghya.
 Let's start the story of Badi Chauth of Vaishakh month

There are 4 badi chauth in a year. Vaishakh chauth is one among them. On the of vaishakh chauth people pray to chauth mata

snippet.title: 10 Day Breathing And Meditation Journey With Gurudev | Boost Your Immunity And Lung Capacity
snippet.description:
The Art of Living brings you the 10-Day Breathing and Meditation Journey With Gurudev.

Sign up and receive updates of this journey via WhatsApp on http://aoliv.in/10days

 Every day we will teach you powerful breathing exercises and an exclusive meditation with Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar that will:

Optimize your oxygen capacity
Strengthen your respiratory system
Reduce anxiety
Calm down the nervous system
Inculcate positive energy in your body and mind

Share this Free Masterclass with your family and friends and help them learn these powerful breathing exercises. Join in the Free Masterclass here: https://youtu.be/BKsw1abYwdg 

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

Music id - MB01R7AHSLPKZSP

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving

snippet.title: ഏറ്റവും വലിയ പാമ്പായ അനക്കോണ്ടകളെ കാണാൻ 7 വർഷങ്ങൾക്ക് ശേഷം വാവ സുരേഷ് എത്തിയപ്പോൾ | SnakemasterEP660
snippet.description:
ലോകത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും വലിയ പാമ്പ് വർഗങ്ങളിലൊന്നായ അനക്കോണ്ടകളുടെ വിശേഷങ്ങളുമായാണ് വാവ സുരേഷ് നിങ്ങൾക്ക് മുന്നിൽ എത്തിയിരിക്കുന്നത്, പൂർണ വളർച്ചയെത്തിയ ഗ്രീൻ അനക്കോണ്ടകൾ 30 അടി വരെ നീളവും 250 കിലോയോളം ഭാരവും വയ്ക്കുന്നതാണ്. സാധാരണയായി വെള്ളത്തിലാണ് കൂടുതലായി ഇവയെ കാണുന്നത്.
അനക്കോണ്ടയ്ക്ക് പൊതുവേ പച്ചകലർന്ന തവിട്ടുനിറമാണുള്ളത്. പെരുമ്പാമ്പിനെപ്പോലെ, ഇരയെ ഞെരുക്കിക്കൊന്നാണ് ഇവ ഭക്ഷിക്കുക.
 ഭക്ഷണമില്ലാതെ ആഴ്ചകളോ മാസങ്ങളോ ജീവിക്കാൻ ഇവയ്ക്ക്  കഴിയുന്നു
ചതുപ്പുകൾ, ചെറിയ ഒഴുക്കുള്ള അരുവികൾ എന്നിവിടങ്ങളിലാണ് പ്രധാനമായും അനക്കോണ്ടകൾ വസിക്കുന്നത്, 
2014 ൽ ആണ് ശ്രീലങ്കയിലെ മൃഗശാലയിൽ നിന്ന് ഏഴ് അനാക്കോണ്ട കുഞ്ഞുങ്ങളെ തിരുവനന്തപുരം മൃഗശാലയിൽ  എത്തിക്കുന്നത്. വളര്‍ച്ചയും ശാരീരിക ഘടനയും കണക്കിലെടുത്ത് പ്രത്യേക കൂടും ആവാസ വ്യവസ്ഥയും എല്ലാം ഒരുക്കിയായിരുന്നു സംരക്ഷണം, മൃഗശാലയില്‍ പ്രദര്‍ശനത്തിന് എത്തിച്ച അനാക്കോണ്ടകളിൽ ഒന്നിനെ വാവയാണ് പ്രത്യേകം സജീകരിച്ച കൂട്ടിലേക്ക് ആദ്യമായി   ഇറക്കി വിട്ടത്, അനക്കോണ്ടകളെ കാണാൻ  7 വർഷങ്ങൾക്ക് ശേഷം  വാവ സുരേഷ് എത്തിയപ്പോൾ...കാണുക സ്നേക്ക് മാസ്റ്ററിന്റെ ഈ എപ്പിസോഡ്.

Vava Suresh comes before you to talk about anaconda, one of the largest snake species in the world! 
Fully grown green anacondas can grow up to 30 feet in length and weigh up to 250 kg.

They are usually found in water.
Anacondas’ colour is generally greenish brown. Like pythons, they eat their prey after wrapping their coil around it and squeezing it.
 They can live for weeks or months without food. Anacondas live mainly in swamps and small streams.
In 2014, seven baby anacondas were brought to the Thiruvananthapuram Zoo from a zoo in Sri Lanka. For their protection, special cages and habitat were created after taking into account their growth and physical structure 

It was Vava who took one of the anacondas into the cage. Now when Vava revisits the place after 7 years...
Watch this episode of Snake Master


A show that gets on the wild trail with Vava Suresh, Kerala’s renowned wildlife conservationist, environmentalist and nature enthusiast. Experience close encounters with the most awesome, snakes. See this master charmer have his way with the King Cobras and Kraits, Vipers and Pythons. 
A man on a mission, Vava Suresh rescues snakes that have strayed from their habitats, stranded and facing threats. He releases them back in the wild. 
Watch him as he flirts with them, charms them, and works his magic on them.  Packed with adventure and adrenalin-kicking exploits, Snakemaster explores Kerala’s wilderness and dense forest paths to take you to the fascinating world of these deadly creatures.  
On the show, Vava Suresh rescues snakes which are stranded and are facing threats and dangers of all kinds.

snippet.description:
വിസ്ഫോടകമായ രംഗങ്ങൾ ഒരു വശത്ത് അരങ്ങേറുമ്പോൾ മറുവശത്ത് സൂര്യയും ഋഷിയും തമ്മിലുള്ള യാത്രയുടെ സാന്ദ്ര നിമിഷങ്ങൾ.

Triumphalism, premature declaration of victory meant no one checked if India had enough vaccines, oxygen, remdesivir, bringing us back to a crisis where we need foreign aid after four decades. ThePrint's Editor-in-Chief Shekhar Gupta talks about how the Modi govt led India into a perfect storm.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Read Shekhar Gupta's National Interest here: https://theprint.in/national-interest/mayday-mayday-how-modi-govt-led-india-into-a-perfect-storm/649433/
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Kareeb | Goldie Sohel | Siddharth Nigam | Ashi Singh | Vishal D |Kunaal V |Official Video |TM Music
snippet.description:
When a crush leads to playful flirting and ends up as love! 
This is what Kareeb is about. A fun, peppy song, composed by Goldie Sohel to Kunaal Vermaa's lyrics, sung by Vishal Dadlani, will appeal to millennials and also create nostalgia for many from older generations.

#Kareeb #SiddharthNigam #AshiSingh

----------------------------------------------------------------
Music Composed by Goldie Sohel
Written by Kunaal Vermaa
Singer - Vishal Dadlani

Music Produced and Arranged by Goldie Sohel
Sound Designer - Manash Borthakur

Guitars - Ishan Das 
Bass - Himangshu Borah 
Saxophones - I D Rao 
Backing Vocals Arranged and designed by Shreya Phukan

Vishal's Vocals recorded at YRF studios by Vijay Dayal
Vocal Design and Edit by DJ Phukan
Instruments and Backing Vocals recorded at Neo Sound by Pranjal Borah

Mixed by Pankaj Borah at Neo Sound 
Mix Assistant - Pranjal Borah 

Mastered by Sunny M.R.

Video:
Featuring - Siddharth Nigam & Ashi Singh
Video Director - United White Flag - Ramji Gulati
Choreographed by - Shashank Dogra
Casting by - Purple Star Entertainment - Forum Vaghela
DOP - Rahul Arora
Editor - Varun Arora
VFX - Vishal Panchal
Drone - Tanish Arora
Styling - Dharti Gulati
Production - Akshay Kapoor (Aay Kay Dubai)
Makeup & Hair - Ishan Malhotra
Photography - Anish Ajmera
Team UWF - Aashish Prasad, Dr. Deep, Mr. Hit
----------------------------------------------------------------

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪

Amazon Music - Apple Music - Gaana - Spotify - Wynk - Jio Saavn - Hungama - Resso - YouTube Music.

Connect with the song: https://tmmusic.fanlink.to/Kareeb

----------------------------------------------------------------
Lyrics :

Dekha tune
Dekha Maine
Chori Chori Yun to sau dafa
Sau Dafa

Jeele thoda
Ho na jaaye
Baton baton mein hi yu subha
Yu Subha
Sau baaton ki baat hai ek main hu tera.. toh kya sochna
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb

Aaya tu jab se nazron mein
Maine fir khwab dekha na
Hoga kal se ye khabron mein
Teri haan ki bachi hai deriyaan
Tu rahega mere zikron mein
Ab kabhi koi hoga na
Keh na paau chaahe lafzon mein
Phir bhi karta rahunga main bayaan
Tu chaahiye baaki Kar li hai
Maine saari tai yaariyan..
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
----------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: PREMIERE! Becca Fierce - Talking Tom & Friends | Season 5 Episode 19
snippet.description:
It’s the return of Angie Fierce! Or at least, the return of her wig… Talking Becca has been wearing it to gain confidence on a scary reality show. Can Becca’s friends bring her to her senses before the wig takes over?

Talking Tom & Friends: Catch up on the adventure so far! 👍
Watch Season 1: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKchvBWCHzmkuE_WSXgPaS1Mn
Watch Season 2: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKci29KBnikbjXLGE1rgEPwHX
Watch Season 3: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKcg-GV-0fmRlaMd1IEzhcga1
Watch Season 4: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKcgUiSG3pCpxELwR9UEuRyu5
Watch Season 5: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKciFuOReqjU4C7abd8KCuo-X

Subscribe now so you don’t miss a minute of the fun! 👉 
https://www.youtube.com/c/talkingfriends

Join Talking Tom & Friends on the adventure of a lifetime! From alien invasions and robot rampages to zombie outbreaks, interdimensional portals, and trips into outer space, the fun never ends when this lovable group of best friends is around! 🤩🎬

☆ Watch most Popular videos here! https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2DBcdm4eKcibcWh20WxPjDjNmX5dPFGB

Talking Tom, Talking Angela, Talking Ben, Talking Hank Talking Ginger and Talking Becca are trying to make their mark on the world. 🌎 Whether they’re coming up with crazy world-changing inventions or making an epic new music video, they always dream big. 

Although things rarely seem to work out the way they planned, they always have each other’s backs. And it’s that friendship, optimism, and sense of fun that make their adventures just too amazing to miss! 😁

Find out more about your favorite friends in our super fun games! 👉 https://outfit7.com/applications/

For more fun...
▶︎ Go on an adventure with Talking Tom: https://www.youtube.com/TalkingTom 
▶︎ Be part of Talking Angela's LittleKitties community! https://www.youtube.com/TalkingAngela 
▶︎ Join Talking Tom Heroes on their missions: https://www.youtube.com/TalkingTomHeroes
▶︎ Are you ready to LEVEL UP THE FUN with us?: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRLtkybxNbcLloUTNWS14ig/

Check out our adventures all around the world!

snippet.description:
After Sakshi regains consciousness, Purvi and Virendra's wedding gets called off, and Purvi runs away from home. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Molkki

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

snippet.title: Telugu Food | Pakka Local | Fine Dine Hyderabad | Street Byte | Silly Monks |
snippet.description:
#HaleemHungama #StreetByte #BajajElectronics
 
Pakka local

Address: plot no.98, Rd Number 7, Imam Khomeini Rd, Banjara Hills, Hyderabad, Telangana

Address: HP Petrol Pump, Gachibowli Serilingampally Mandal, Gachibowli, Telangana 500032

Address: Plot 152, Gachibowli - Miyapur Rd, opp. Harsha Toyota (Kondapur) Sales, Service & U-Trust, Prashanth Nagar Colony, Kondapur, Telangana

Guess what guys?! WE'RE BACK! SEASON 3 OF HALEEM HUNGAMA with @bajajelectronicsindia IS OFFICIALLY HERE!! 

*The rules are as follows:*
- The contestants will take selfies of themselves holding a serving of Haleem and post it to their social media and use the hashtags *#BajajElectronics #StreetByte #Sillymonks #HaleemHungama
- A total of *30 members* will be chosen at the end of the contest. Prizes will be distributed to them over a period of *six days.* 
- *Five winners* per day will be called. Gift hampers will be distributed at *selected Bajaj Electronics stores*. The selection of winners and prize distribution will happen during the last few days of the campaign
(The more number of entries, the higher chance of you winning!) 

So get clicking!

Bajaj Ectronics  is one of Hyderabad's most premier chain of consumer electronics stores.
It started off as a dream in the year 1983 with the first Bajaj Electronics branch at Hyderabad. We earned the trust of the locals and grew from strength to strength, to what is now a chain of the most genuine electronic stores across twin cities, offering quality service at the best price. An extension to those services is this online outlet where you can choose from a wide display of the latest gadgets & appliances while availing some crazy offers on the side! It’s faster. It’s smarter!

What gives us the edge over other online stores is our presence in the city. More than 85 outlets are spread across the length and breadth of the city which offers the following advantages to its online buyers:

#StreetByte #BajajElectronics #HaleemHungama

Street Byte is all about E^3 - Explore. Eat. Enjoy! 
Subscribe to our YouTube channel and follow us on social media for regular updates. 

Official Street Byte merchandise is now here - https://spoilx.com/collections/street-byte

Subscribe - https://bit.ly/3cDrJDh
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/streetbyte
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/streetbyte/
Twitter - https://twitter.com/street_byte

After the WWE Universal Championship match between Roman Reigns and Daniel Bryan was over Cesaro proceeded to attack Reigns. Jey Uso then hit Cesaro and trapped him whereas Reigns took a chair and proceeded to hit Bryan with it while Uso held back Cesaro and made him watch it.
.
.

snippet.title: डाळ तांदूळ न भिजवता आणि आंबवता बनवा इन्स्टंट डोसा | Instant Crispy Dosa | No Fermentation | Madhura
snippet.description:
#InstantDosa #NoFermentationDosa #DosaRecipe

इन्स्टंट डोसा बवण्यासाठी लागणारे साहित्य 
• १ कप तांदूळ 
• १/४ कप उडीद डाळ 
• १/४ कप पोहे 
• १/४ चमचा मेथ्या 
• एका लिंबाचा रस 
• १/२ चमचा साखर 
• चवीनुसार मीठ 
• १ चमचा इनो फ्रुट सॉल्ट 
• तेल

Madhura's recipe Masala (Pack of 3)  - https://amzn.to/2L6y13i
Madhurasrecipe Kanda Lasoon Masala - https://amzn.to/3okkjrP
Madhurasrecipe Byadgi Mirchi Masala - https://amzn.to/3hKvRSU
Madhurasrecipe Goda Masala - https://amzn.to/3hRjsg6
Flipkart - https://bityl.co/4Ip9
किंवा ९१३६८२२२२४ या नंबर वर व्हॉटसऍप मेसेज करा  

मधुराज रेसिपी मसाले ऑर्डर कसे करायचे यासाठी हा विडिओ पहा
https://youtu.be/9Db_owqWJe4

We already have seen 4-5 dosa recipes like paper dosa, masala dosa, mysore masala dosa, davangiri dosa etc. In every recipe you need to soak dal and rice, grind them and fermentation of batter. You just can’t make dosa whenever you feel like. But in today’s recipe we are making instant dosa using dal and rice only. You can avoid all above steps and make dosa whenever you want. This dosa turns out nice, crispy exactly like fermented batter dosa. You can try this recipe at home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 1 cup Rice
• 1/4 cup Urad dal
• 1/4 cup Poha / Flattened rice
• 1/4 tsp Fenugreek seeds
• 1 Lemon juice
• 1/2 tsp Sugar
• A little Water 
• Salt to taste
• 1 tsp Eno fruit salt
• Oil
 
Method:
• In a bowl take rice, urad dal, poha, fenugreek seeds and mix well. 
• Wash everything well together 3-4 times with water. 
• Transfer the mixture into a blender jar and add lemon juice, sugar, water. 
• You can use 1/2 cup curd or buttermilk in place of lemon juice. 
• Blend everything well together into smooth paste. 
• Transfer the batter into a bowl and add salt, eno fruit salt. 
• Mix well quickly and dosa batter is ready. 
• Heat up a pan on medium heat and spread oil. 
• Turn the heat to low. 
• Add the batter at the center and spread it evenly. 
• Turn the heat to high, cover and cook for about 2 minutes. 
• Remove the lid and cook until lower side gets nice brown color. 
• When lower side gets nice browning brush a little oil on upper side and loosen the edges. 
• Fold the dosa and transfer it into a serving dish. 
• Instant dosa is all ready. 
• Serve the dosa with sambar and chutney.

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 215
snippet.description:
Swara gets the shock of her life when she realises that Durga Prasad has conned her into signing the divorce papers under pressure by Ragini

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.description:

Clinical expertise across all medical specialities by delivering healthcare with passion and commitment.
Here is our New Video : illarikam Alludu| Web Series Episode 5

Special Thanks
Raheem Shaik (Drone)
Raaz penumathsa
Pavan satish
K. Sai Teja

తారాగణం :
గోపీనాథ్ 
జాను హిందుస్తానీ
సుమన్ సింగసాని
లక్ష్మి కాకర్ల
వీరభద్రం
కిట్టయ్య
శశికాంత్
అచ్యుత్
చక్రధర్ దిట్టకవి

డైరెక్టర్ ఆఫ్ ఫోటోగ్రఫీ 
వివేక్ నెక్కల

సంగీతం
సృజన్ శశాంక
రాజ్ ప్రకాష్

ఎడిటింగ్-డి.ఐ -సౌండ్ మిక్సింగ్ 
తారా రెడ్డి 

ప్రొడక్షన్ మేనేజర్ 
శశికాంత్ 

అసిస్టెంట్ డైరెక్టర్స్
ఆకాష్ సూరత్తు
కృష్ణ కాంత్
నాని దేవనబోయిన

పోస్టర్స్ 
RC డిజైన్స్ 

డబ్బింగ్
దుర్గ దాసరి

రచన సహకారం 
చక్రధర్ దిట్టకవి

స్క్రీన్ ప్లే- మాటలు
అనిల్
గోపీనాథ్ 

దర్శకత్వం 
టీం CAPDT

ప్రోడ్యుసర్స్ 
శరత్ అంకిత్ నడిమింటి
చిన్న వాసుదేవ్ రెడ్డి

snippet.title: महामारी उच्चाटनासाठी सर्व शक्तिपीठे व ज्योतिर्लिंग सज्ज एकच ध्यास विश्वकल्याणासाठी एक तास #Gurumauli
snippet.description:
सर्व शक्तिपीठे व ज्योतिर्लिंग यांचे दर्शन 
!! श्री स्वामी समर्थ !! 

विश्वकल्याणासाठी एक तास

श्री दुर्गासप्तशती पाठ वाचन करणाऱ्या सर्व सेवेकाऱ्यानी, भाविकांनी आपली व आपल्या कुटुंबातील सदस्यांची  सेवा  करण्या करिता खालील लिंक वरती क्लिक करून सेवेची पूर्वनोंदनी / जल्या वरती करावी. ⤵️
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScDIqXSCcNmTxu33kL8WRoisgnQApxYDdpi0XN85HYIDDAKyQ/viewform?usp=sf_link

#Tuljabhavanimata #Tuljapur #Mahalakshmi #Kolhapur #Trambakeshwar #Jyotirling 
#Shirdi #Vani #Saptashrungi #Pushkar #Brahmamandir #Shegav #Gajananmaharaj 
#Boriwali #Vedmatagayatri #Mumbadevi #Vinchur #Lonjai #Madhi #
गुरुमाऊली परमपूज्य  आण्णासाहेब मोरे 
प्रमुख – श्री स्वामी समर्थ सेवा व आध्यात्मिक विकास मार्ग (दिंडोरी प्रणीत)
प्रमुख – अखिल भारतीय श्री स्वामी समर्थ गुरुपीठ, त्र्यंबकेश्वर.
अध्यक्ष – श्री स्वामी समर्थ कृषी विकास व संशोधन चॅरीटेबल ट्रस्ट.

अधिक माहितीसाठी संपर्क:
श्री स्वामी समर्थ प्रधान केंद्र, दिंडोरी : ०२५५७-२२१७१०
श्री गुरुपीठ मध्यवर्ती कार्यालय :  ०२५९४- २३४२५३/५४ 
All India Shri Swami Samarth Gurupith, Trimbakeshwar, Nasik
Pradhan kendra Dindori, Nasik

१) YouTube channel Link: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC5mIaJno_3MmoNbn0NWwwJg?view_as=subscriber


२) Instagram Link https://www.instagram.com/dindoripranitsevamarg/

३) Twitter Link
https://twitter.com/dindoripranit

४) Facebook account Link
https://www.facebook.com/pradhankendra

५) Facebook Page Link:
https://www.facebook.com/dindoripranit/

६) Website Link:
https//:www.dindoripranit.org
७)ONLINE श्री जनकल्याण योजनेत सहभाग घेण्याकरिता https://www.dindoripranit.org/jankalyan-yojna  या लिंकवर जाऊन आपला फॉर्म भरावा  

🙏 सर्वांना विनंती आहे कि, वरील सर्व अधिकृत सोशिअल मिडियाला आपण स्वत: ✅ Follow, 👍 like, 📝 join, subscribe करून ज्ञानदानाच्या सेवेमध्ये सहभागी व्हावे.

हा मेसेज जास्तीत जास्त शेअर करावे.
